# Spambase Dataset Provenance

Dataset:
- Spambase Data Set (UCI Machine Learning Repository)

Source URLs:
- https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/machine-learning-databases/spambase/spambase.data
- https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/machine-learning-databases/spambase/spambase.names

Local files:
- `spambase.data`
- `spambase.names`

Acquisition date (local workspace):
- 2026-04-19

Use in this repository:
- integrated into the structural-information harness as independent external lane
- dataset key: `external_uci_spambase`
- target used in harness: spam label (`1` vs `0`)

Nonclaim:
- this repository does not claim authorship of the source dataset.
